text: [S_0] ("2026-01-01", "Patient admitted to bed no.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_1] ("2026-01-01", "Enters for: anasarcatic state.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_2] ("2026-01-01", "A: clear airways, alert, cooperative, and orientated B: eupnoeic on room air, no use of accessory muscles, bilateral expansion of the hemithoraxes, normal respiratory rate C: capillary refill <2sec, strong and symmetrical pulses, CVP 18g right upper limb in place and patent.", 0.0, 0.1) | [S_3] ("2026-01-01", "Spontaneous diuresis active in the hygienic unit.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_4] ("2026-01-01", "D: GCS 15, isochoric and isocyclic pupils, fluent and oriented speech, no unilateral motor and sensory deficit.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_5] ("2026-01-01", "E: euthermic.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_6] ("2026-01-01", "Persistent anasarca, grade 2 diabetic ulcer on right foot and grade 1 lesion on the left paratibial region RADAR negative.", 0.0, 0.1) | [S_7] ("2026-01-01", "Observation continues with preventive interventions for accidental falls pending transfer to PLACE on 04/28.", 0.0, 0.5)
